notes: Expected blocker output for case_003_blocker_unapproved_geometry. The fixture uses approval_state='invalid_state' (not in VALID_APPROVAL_STATES = {approved, pending, rejected, retired}) which triggers the geometry_record_unapproved blocker at load_geometry_catalog time per catalog.py lines 381-384. NOTE: TASK-016-TRIAL-001 originally used 'pending' here, but TASK-016 implementation PR #67 explicitly does NOT raise geometry_record_unapproved at load time for the 'pending' state (line 414 in catalog.py is a no-op `continue`). The fixture was corrected in TASK-016-TRIAL-002 to use 'invalid_state' instead so the fixture actually triggers the intended blocker. The approval_state value 'invalid_state' appears verbatim in the context dict because that is what the implementation includes (it does not normalize the value before raising).
